hooks.command: python --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && python -c "import yt_dlp, flask" 2>/dev/null && echo 'ytmp4-ai-digest: dependencies OK' || echo 'ytmp4-ai-digest: NOTE — for the slash-command path run: pip install -r ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt (the Cowork/MCP path auto-installs its own venv, no action needed)'
